scope: Individual and HUF taxpayers under old tax regime only.
source_name: Income Tax Department, Government of India
notes: Limit unchanged since Budget 2014-15 (raised from 1L to 1.5L). Not available under new regime. Budget 2026-27 made no changes. Eligible investments include: PPF, ELSS, NSC, life insurance premiums, home loan principal, tuition fees, EPF, 5-year FD, Sukanya Samriddhi.

eligible_investments.name: Life Insurance Premium
eligible_investments.notes: Premium up to 10% of sum assured for policies issued after 01-Apr-2012

data.notes_80ccd1b: Rs 50,000 additional deduction under Section 80CCD(1B) for NPS Tier I, over and above 80C limit of Rs 1.5L
